member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.EnterScope
member.summary: Enters the lock and returns a that may be disposed to exit the lock. Once the method returns, the calling thread would be the only thread that holds the lock. This method is intended to be used along with a language construct that would automatically dispose the , such as with the C# using statement.

member.name: T:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3
member.summary: Provides a type that may be used to perform operations on a using a as a key instead of a .
member.remarks: This polyfill performs O(n) lookups by linearly scanning the dictionary's keys and invoking on each. The native .NET 9+ counterpart is O(1) by using the dictionary's internal hash buckets.

member.name: P:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.Dictionary
member.summary: Gets the against which this instance performs operations.

member.name: P:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.Item(`2)
member.summary: Gets or sets the value associated with the specified alternate key.

member.name: M:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.ContainsKey(`2)
member.summary: Determines whether the dictionary contains the specified alternate key.

member.name: M:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.TryAdd(`2,`1)
member.summary: Attempts to add the specified alternate key and value to the dictionary.

member.name: M:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.TryGetValue(`2,`1@)
member.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified alternate key.

member.name: M:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.TryGetValue(`2,`0@,`1@)
member.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified alternate key, along with the actual key stored in the dictionary.

member.name: M:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.Remove(`2)
member.summary: Removes the value with the specified alternate key from the dictionary.

member.name: M:Polyfills.DictionaryAlternateLookup`3.Remove(`2,`0@,`1@)
member.summary: Removes the value with the specified alternate key from the dictionary, copying the actual key and value to the out parameters.

member.name: T:Polyfills.HashSetAlternateLookup`2
member.summary: Provides a type that may be used to perform operations on a using a instead of a .
member.remarks: This polyfill performs O(n) lookups by linearly scanning the set and invoking on each element. The native .NET 9+ counterpart is O(1) by using the set's internal hash buckets.

member.name: P:Polyfills.HashSetAlternateLookup`2.Set
member.summary: Gets the against which this instance performs operations.

member.name: M:Polyfills.HashSetAlternateLookup`2.Add(`1)
member.summary: Adds an item that is created from the specified alternate value, if no equal value already exists.

member.name: M:Polyfills.HashSetAlternateLookup`2.Contains(`1)
member.summary: Determines whether the set contains a value equal to the specified alternate value.

member.name: M:Polyfills.HashSetAlternateLookup`2.Remove(`1)
member.summary: Removes the value equal to the specified alternate value from the set.

member.name: M:Polyfills.HashSetAlternateLookup`2.TryGetValue(`1,`0@)
member.summary: Searches the set for the value equal to the specified alternate value and returns it.

member.summary: Writes a line of output to the console and log file (if logging is enabled).

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context.WriteError(System.String)
member.summary: Writes an error message to the error console and log file (if logging is enabled).
member.remarks: _hasErrors is set to true unconditionally, so will return 1 regardless of whether suppresses the console output. Stderr output is suppressed when is true, but the message is still written to the log file when one is open.

member.name: T:ApiMark.Tool.Program
member.summary: CLI entry point for the ApiMark documentation tool.

remarks.para: Dispatch is priority-ordered: version check first (no banner), then banner, then help, then self-validation, then main tool logic. Only the highest-priority matching action is executed per invocation.

and from are treated as expected errors: their messages are written to stderr and exit code 1 is returned without a stack trace. Any other exception propagated out of is re-thrown so that the runtime can record it in event logs.

member.name: P:ApiMark.Tool.Program.Version
member.summary: Gets the application version string.
member.remarks: The version is read from the via reflection on every access. Callers that need the value more than once should store the result locally.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: Application entry point.
member.param: Command-line arguments from the host environment.
member.exception: Thrown when an unexpected error occurs; re-thrown after writing to stderr.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.Program.Run(ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context)
member.summary: Runs the program logic based on the provided context.
member.param: The context containing command-line arguments and program state.
member.remarks: Dispatch is priority-ordered: version → banner → help → validate → main tool logic. The version flag short-circuits before the banner so that --version output is undecorated by the application header.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.Program.RunToolLogic(ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context)
member.summary: Runs the main tool logic — validates required options, constructs the generator, and generates output.
member.param: The context containing parsed options and program state.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.Program.CreateGenerator(ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context)
member.summary: Constructs and returns a configured from the parsed context.
member.returns: A configured ready for Generate to be called.
member.exception: Thrown when is not a recognized value.
Thrown when identifies an unrecognized or not-yet-implemented language subcommand.

member.summary: Prints the application banner to the context output stream.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.Program.PrintHelp(ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context)
member.summary: Prints usage and option information to the context output stream.

member.name: T:ApiMark.Tool.SelfTest.Validation
member.summary: Provides self-validation functionality for ApiMark Tool.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.SelfTest.Validation.VersionPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\b\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+
Explanation:
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.SelfTest.Validation.Run(ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context)
member.summary: Runs self-validation tests and optionally writes results to a file.
member.param: The context containing command-line arguments and program state.
member.remarks: If any self-test fails, context.WriteError is called for each failure, which sets context.ExitCode to 1 as a side-effect. If a results file is requested and its extension is unsupported, context.WriteError is also called, resulting in a non-zero exit code.

member.name: M:ApiMark.Tool.SelfTest.Validation.PrintValidationHeader(ApiMark.Tool.Cli.Context)
member.summary: Prints the validation header with system information.
